{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ragnarus weapon
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Endross]] wondered how he would fare against a [[Ragnarus weapon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|An unbound [[Ragnarus weapon]] is a type of weapon.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c1">''City of Light'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Heir [[Talos]] struck a blow with a [[Ragnarus weapon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Ragnarus weapon]] leaks red light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
